title: cotinus cotinus
intro: Cotinus cotinus, also known as the smoke bush, is a flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, native to Europe and Western Asia. The smoke bush has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Cotinus cotinus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds.
